name: Claude | first meet
description:
How the fuck did Andrew never think to mention that his sibling wasвҖҰ well. Like that?

He wasnвҖҷt prepared for this.

Claude thought you would be a quick favor, background noise at best, someone to grumble at while he waited for his coffee to finish brewing. Instead, he opens the door half-asleep and shirtlessвҖ”only to find reality staring him down, hotter than anything his brain was capable of handling before noon.

Now Claude has to get through the day pretending heвҖҷs totally fine, definitely not staring too long, and absolutely not letting Andrew catch on that heвҖҷs already in way over his head.

бЁ’

thanks for commissioning me, cat! oвҒ (вҒ (вҒ *вҒ ^вҒ в–ҪвҒ ^вҒ *вҒ )вҒ )вҒ o
